name: Popcorn Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the popped corn in a food processor or food grinder and grind it into kernel-size pieces.
2. In a large bowl, beat egg whites until frothy. Gradually add baking powder, salt, and cream of tartar, beating to stiff peaks.
3. Add the sugar replacement to the egg white mixture and beat until well blended.
4. Gently fold the popcorn pieces into the beaten egg whites until just combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 14 minutes, or until lightly browned. Yield: approximately 36 cookies.
7. Exchange 6 cookies: negligible, 16 calories in 6 cookies.
Source: Diabetic Candy, Cookie & Dessert Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand (c. 1982). Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, November 1993.
